title: In Memory of John W. Francis, Jr.
content:
He was the pulse-beat of true hearts,
        The love-light of fond eyes:
    When such a man from earth departs,
        'Tis the survivor dies.
meaning:
"In Memory of John W. Francis, Jr." is a quintessential example of George Pope Morris's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
